title: News snapshot
description: Hourly point-in-time snapshot produced by the news-research subagent. One file per hour during US market hours. Distinct from the per-ticker fact ledger: news snapshots are global (multi-ticker, time-windowed) rather than per-trade-lifecycle. Material deltas between consecutive snapshots drive Telegram push notifications.

top_movers.description: US gainers/losers >5% intraday cross-referenced against watchlist + positions. NEW names (not already tracked) are candidate EP / gap-up / gap-down flags for the orchestrator.

social_signals.description: Phase 1.5 — StockTwits-derived sentiment aggregates per ticker for open positions + selected top-movers. Informational only; never gates trades. See $defs/social_signal.

x_signals.description: Phase 1.5+ — material X (Twitter) posts about watchlist + open-position tickers, surfaced by tools.news_research.x_scanner. Cashtag-driven (sibling to thematic x_ingest which is handle-driven). Stage 1 hard-floors + Stage 2 Haiku classifier + Stage 3 top-N-per-ticker cap. See $defs/x_signal.

market_temperature.description: Schema 1.3 — overlay aggregate market-temperature indices composed by tools.news_research.market_temperature. Put-Call ratio + CNN Fear & Greed + AAII weekly + VIX term structure. NEVER a gate — informational context for risk-and-compliance + swing-critic-panel macro-skeptic + trade-skeptic only. Block may be absent in legacy 1.2 snapshots; new snapshots always include it (possibly populated with errors).

macro_events.description: Scheduled or breaking macro events (Fed speak, FOMC, CPI, employment). Drives broad-market push criteria.

material_deltas.description: Items the synth pass judged worth pushing to Telegram, distilled from per_ticker_items + top_movers + macro_events. Empty array = no push this hour.

source_tag.description: Provenance tag. Conventions: web:<domain>, broker_api, sec_filing, earnings_release, fed_release, tool:<name>, manual. Phase 1 default aggregators are biztoc.com (business-news feed) and finviz.com/news + finviz.com/quote.ashx (per-ticker news + screener for top movers); record the immediate publisher when the aggregator links out.

severity.description: Subagent's judgment of how load-bearing this item is for the trading workflow. high = warrants attention this session.

delta_vs_prior.description: Relationship to the same logical item in the prior hour's snapshot. new=first appearance; unchanged=carried over; escalated=severity raised or facts hardened; resolved=situation closed.

schema_version.description: 1.0 = original Phase 1 shape. 1.1 = adds social_signals[] + three social material_delta reasons (Phase 1.5). 1.2 = adds x_signals[] + three x_signal_* material_delta reasons. 1.3 = adds market_temperature{} overlay block (Put-Call + CNN Fear & Greed + AAII + VIX term). New snapshots should write 1.3; older snapshots remain valid at their original version.

snapshot_id.description: ISO timestamp keyed to the top of the hour (e.g. 14:00:00Z). Matches the filename HH.yml.

asof.description: Point in time the snapshot represents.

fetched_at.description: When the subagent finished its gather pass.

ticker_count.description: Count of distinct tickers covered across per_ticker_items + top_movers.

prior_snapshot_id.description: Snapshot_id of the immediately prior hour's snapshot used for delta detection. Null on the first snapshot of a session.

vs_prior_snapshot_pct.description: Change since prior hour's snapshot. Null/absent on first snapshot.

type.description: Item category. price_action = unusual move not explained by news (covers vol spikes, range breaks).

summary.description: One- to two-sentence subagent summary. Avoid editorialising.

bear_check.description: Skeptic-pass output. Populated when severity >= medium. Empty disconfirming list does not negate the item — it means the bear pass did not find a counter-source.

volume_ratio.description: Today's volume / 20-day avg. Often unknown intraday; populate when available.

reason.description: Which row of the material-delta threshold table triggered this push. Phase 1 reasons are the first eight; Phase 1.5 adds the three social_* reasons sourced from social_signals[]; Phase 1.2 adds the three x_signal_* reasons sourced from x_signals[].

ticker.description: The subject ticker, when the delta is about a single name. For non-ticker-specific reasons (sector_move, fed_speak, fomc_release) OMIT this field or set the sector ETF symbol (e.g. XLK) — but an explicit null is tolerated so a sector-level delta never rejects the whole snapshot.

source_item_index.description: Index back into per_ticker_items / top_movers / macro_events / social_signals / x_signals. Container implied by reason: social_* reasons index into social_signals[]; x_signal_* reasons index into x_signals[].

x_signal.description: Schema 1.2 — one material X (Twitter) post about a watchlist or open-position ticker, written by tools.news_research.x_scanner. Stage 1 hard-floors (engagement / author / recency / language) drop ~80% of fetched tweets pre-classifier; Stage 2 Haiku verdict lands in classifier_result; Stage 3 caps at 5 per ticker per hour. Sibling to social_signals[] (StockTwits aggregates) — both feed material_deltas[] but each is sourced + filtered independently. Counterpart to thematic x_ingest's per-post artifacts at ledgers/thematic/corpus/x/<date>/<post_id>.yml — cross_consumer_ref.thematic_ledger_path is non-null when both consumers ingested the same tweet (e.g. @leopoldasch posting $NVDA).

tweet_id.description: Twitter snowflake ID. Canonical key for deduplication.

author_followers.description: Follower count at fetch time. Used by Stage 1 hard-floor (default >= 1000).

cashtag.description: The $TICKER that triggered the cashtag query. Example: $NVDA.

created_at.description: Raw createdAt from twitterapi.io (typically RFC 2822 'Wed Oct 08 20:19:20 +0000 2025', occasionally ISO-8601). Subagent normalises if needed; this preserves provenance.

text.description: Full tweet text (may include URLs, mentions, hashtags).

in_reply_to.description: Tweet ID of the parent post when this is a reply. Substantive thesis updates sometimes route through reply chains, so replies are kept (the query strips retweets only).

quote_post_id.description: Tweet ID of the quoted post when this is a quote-tweet.

quote_post_excerpt.description: Text excerpt of the quoted post; preserves context without a second API call.

has_media.description: True when the tweet contains images / video / GIFs.

url.description: Canonical x.com URL for the post.

view_count.description: Sometimes absent from the twitterapi.io response.

material.description: Stage 2 verdict. False = drop (won't appear in x_signals[] after Stage 3 cap).

rationale.description: One- to three-sentence subagent reasoning. Useful for forensics + scorecard tuning.

sentiment_tag.description: bullish / bearish drives the x_signal_*_open_pos material_delta reasons; breaking-news drives x_signal_breaking_news_watched; neutral never triggers a push.

named_themes.description: Free-form theme tags extracted by the classifier (e.g. 'stage_2_reset', 'analyst_upgrade', 'earnings_beat'). For scorecard analysis later.

classifier_cost_usd.description: Per-call cost (~$0.0003 for Haiku). Optional but recommended for monthly cost tracking.

classifier_result.description: Stage 2 LLM verdict. Null on dry-runs OR when the subagent intentionally bypassed Stage 2 (e.g. cost-cap circuit-breaker fired).

thematic_ledger_path.description: Path to the per-post YAML in ledgers/thematic/corpus/x/<date>/<post_id>.yml when the same tweet was ALSO ingested by the thematic side (e.g. @leopoldasch posted about $NVDA). Null when no overlap. The two consumers ingest independently — this field is a cheap audit pointer, not a coupling.

market_temperature.description: Schema 1.3 — composed market-temperature block from tools.news_research.market_temperature.fetch_market_temperature(). Each child is either a populated dict OR a {error, as_of: null} sentinel on fetch failure.

as_of.description: Max of children's as_of timestamps (or AAII as_of_week). Falls back to composer-time when no child succeeded.

put_call.description: CBOE put/call ratio. Success shape: {as_of, total, equity, source: 'cboe'}. Error shape: {error, as_of: null}.

fear_greed.description: CNN Fear & Greed. Success shape: {as_of, value 0-100, regime, source: 'cnn'}. Error shape: {error, as_of: null}.

aaii.description: AAII weekly survey. Success shape: {as_of_week, bull, neutral, bear, bull_bear_spread, source: 'aaii'}. Error shape: {error, as_of: null}.

vix_term.description: VIX term structure. Success shape: {as_of, vix, vix9d, vix3m, vix9d_vix, vix_vix3m, regime, source: 'cboe'}. Error shape: {error, as_of: null}.

errors.description: Per-fetcher error tags. Empty when all four succeeded.

social_signal.description: Phase 1.5 — per-ticker sentiment aggregate from StockTwits (primary) or Reddit search (fallback) over the last ~60 minutes. Informational signal; never gates trades. Cross-link target: confluence with tools.climax_top_detect for the EOD sell pipeline.

classification.description: climax_warning = bull_share>=0.85 & volume_z>=2.0 on an open position (potential blow-off top). bearish_pile_on = bull_share<=0.20 & volume_z>=2.0 on an open position (thesis-break warning). buzz_spike = volume_z>=3.0 on a top-mover with flagged_as potential_ep (real catalyst or pump?). cooling = prior hour was climax_warning, now bull_share<0.7. quiet = volume_z<1.0 (default; emit only if prior hour was active).

msg_count.description: Tagged-message count over the lookback window (tagged = user marked Bullish or Bearish on StockTwits; untagged dropped).

bull_share.description: bullish_count / (bullish_count + bearish_count) over tagged messages. Absent when msg_count < 5 (sample too small).

volume_z.description: (current_hour_msg_count - baseline_mean) / baseline_std over the trailing 24-hour per-ticker baseline in _state/social_baseline.json. Null/absent during the first 24 hours of a new ticker's baseline accumulation.

top_url.description: Single highest-engagement message link for spot-check / forensics. Optional.

source.description: Typically web:stocktwits.com; web:reddit.com as fallback when StockTwits coverage is thin.

notes.description: Optional free-text — e.g. 'spam-filtered N/M messages', 'baseline still warming, volume_z unreliable'.
